earth_baseline.ai_reasoning: Heart rate, oxygen level, blood pressure, sleep, bone density, and mental status are all within baseline mission limits.
earth_baseline.medical_recommendation: Continue baseline logging, hydration, normal sleep schedule, and pre-mission physical conditioning.
earth_baseline.chatbot_message: Adam, baseline readings are stable. Keep following the checklist and report any unusual symptoms.

pre_launch_check.ai_reasoning: Heart rate and blood pressure are slightly elevated while oxygen and radiation values remain stable.
pre_launch_check.medical_recommendation: Use controlled breathing, complete final hydration checks, and keep the medical team watching cardiovascular changes.
pre_launch_check.chatbot_message: Pre-launch stress is expected. Try a 60-second breathing cycle and keep your headset open for support.

launch_stress.ai_reasoning: Heart rate and blood pressure have spiked under launch stress, while oxygen remains acceptable.
launch_stress.medical_recommendation: Monitor heart rate and blood pressure every cycle. Keep Adam seated, secured, and coached through breathing commands.
launch_stress.chatbot_message: Your heart rate is high because of launch stress. Stay strapped in and follow the crew medical breathing rhythm.

zero_gravity.ai_prediction: Microgravity adaptation with early skeletal unloading.
zero_gravity.ai_reasoning: Fluid shift indicators and early bone-density reduction appear while sleep rhythm begins to drift.
zero_gravity.medical_recommendation: Start resistance exercise, measure sleep rhythm, and watch lower-body strength and spinal comfort.
zero_gravity.chatbot_message: Zero gravity can feel strange at first. I will track sleep, balance, and lower-body changes closely.

exercise_neglect.ai_prediction: Bone-density loss risk in pelvis and legs.
exercise_neglect.ai_reasoning: Exercise sessions were missed while bone density is trending down during microgravity exposure.
exercise_neglect.medical_recommendation: Resume resistance training today, add lower-body loading, and schedule a medical check for bone-density trend review.
exercise_neglect.chatbot_message: Adam, your exercise streak dropped. I can guide a short resistance session focused on legs and pelvis support.

solar_radiation_storm.ai_reasoning: Radiation level has exceeded emergency threshold and stress markers are elevated.
solar_radiation_storm.medical_recommendation: Move to the radiation shelter, limit exposure time, pause nonessential tasks, and monitor nausea, headache, and fatigue.
solar_radiation_storm.chatbot_message: Radiation alert. Go to the shielded area now and confirm when you are secured.

mental_health_isolation.ai_prediction: Isolation stress with poor sleep and reduced motivation.
mental_health_isolation.ai_reasoning: Mental status is marked as isolated, sleep is low, and exercise completion is partial, suggesting rising psychological fatigue.
mental_health_isolation.medical_recommendation: Start a private support conversation, schedule a family message window, restore sleep routine, and reduce noncritical workload.
mental_health_isolation.chatbot_message: Adam, I am here with you. You are not alone in this mission. Tell me your stress level from 1 to 10, and we will reset the next hour together with one small step at a time.

landing_preparation.ai_prediction: Landing-related balance and lower-body weakness risk.
landing_preparation.ai_reasoning: Bone density remains reduced and re-entry preparation increases cardiovascular and spinal load.
landing_preparation.medical_recommendation: Continue lower-body conditioning, monitor hydration, prepare landing medical support, and plan assisted standing after return.
landing_preparation.chatbot_message: Landing prep is active. I will keep tracking balance, sleep, and leg strength for the return sequence.

rehabilitation.ai_reasoning: Vital signs are normalizing and sleep is improving, while bone density still needs rehabilitation tracking.
rehabilitation.medical_recommendation: Continue rehabilitation, repeat bone-density assessment, track mood after mission, and increase exercise intensity slowly.
rehabilitation.chatbot_message: Welcome back, Adam. Your recovery trend is improving. Let us keep rehab steady and avoid overloading too soon.
